question: How many days had passed since I bought my Adidas running shoes when I realized one of the shoelaces on my old Converse sneakers had broken?
ground_truth_answer: 14 days. 15 days (including the last day) is also acceptable.

retrieval_results.context:
Acquired new Adidas running shoes on January 10
User replaced broken shoelace on old Converse sneakers on January 24
User bought new Adidas running shoes with sister at outlet mall on January 10
The Adidas running shoes cost $80
The user liked the design of the Adidas running shoes
The user wants to clean the sneakers that were worn on February 1 for basketball
User lent their Vans to their brother, who returned them on 2026-02-10, and the shoes were tighter than before
